name: k6
description: Grafana k6 is an open-source load testing tool that makes performance testing easy

args.name: archive
args.description: Name of a file to archive

subcommands.name: cloud
subcommands.description: Run a test on the cloud

args.name: cloud
args.description: Name of a script to run

subcommands.name: completion
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for bash

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for fish

subcommands.name: powershell
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for powershell

subcommands.name: zsh
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for zsh

args.name: completion
args.description: Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell

subcommands.name: convert
subcommands.description: Convert a HAR file to a k6 script

args.name: inspect
args.description: K6 script to inspect or archive

args.name: login
args.description: K6 script to inspect or archive

arg.name: address
arg.description: Address of the API server

arg.name: batch
arg.description: Max parallel batch reqs (default 20)

options.description: Max parallel batch reqs per host (default 6)

arg.name: batch-per-host
arg.description: Max parallel batch reqs per host (default 6)

arg.name: vus
arg.description: Number of virtual users (default 1)

arg.name: duration
arg.description: Test duration limit

options.description: Script total iteration limit (among all VUs)

arg.name: iterations
arg.description: Script total iteration limit (among all VUs)

arg.name: stage
arg.description: Add a stage, as `[duration]:[target]`

arg.name: execution-segment
arg.description: Limit execution to the specified segment, e.g. 10%, 1/3, 0.2:2/3

arg.name: execution-segment-sequence
arg.description: The execution segment sequence

options.description: Start the test in a paused state

arg.name: paused
arg.description: Start the test in a paused state

arg.name: no-setup
arg.description: Don't run setup()

arg.name: no-teardown
arg.description: Don't run teardown()

arg.name: max-redirects
arg.description: Follow at most n redirects (default 10)

arg.name: rps
arg.description: Limit requests per second

arg.name: user-agent
arg.description: User agent for http requests (default "k6/0.39.0 (https://k6.io/)")

options.description: Log all HTTP requests and responses. Excludes body by default. To include body use '--http-debug=full'

arg.name: http-debug
arg.description: Log all HTTP requests and responses. Excludes body by default. To include body use '--http-debug=full'

arg.name: insecure-skip-tls-verify
arg.description: Skip verification of TLS certificates

arg.name: no-connection-reuse
arg.description: Disable keep-alive connections

arg.name: no-vu-connection-reuse
arg.description: Don't reuse connections between iterations

options.description: Minimum amount of time k6 will take executing a single iteration

arg.name: min-iteration-duration
arg.description: Minimum amount of time k6 will take executing a single iteration

options.description: Throw warnings (like failed http requests) as errors

arg.name: throw
arg.description: Throw warnings (like failed http requests) as errors

options.description: Blacklist an ip range from being called

arg.name: blacklist-ip
arg.description: Blacklist an ip range from being calledd

options.description: Block a case-insensitive hostname pattern, with optional leading wildcard, from being called

arg.name: block-hostnames
arg.description: Block a case-insensitive hostname pattern, with optional leading wildcard, from being called

options.description: Define stats for trend metrics (response times), one or more as 'avg,p(95),...' (default 'avg,min,med,max,p(90),p(95)')

arg.name: summary-trend-stats
arg.description: Define stats for trend metrics (response times), one or more as 'avg,p(95),...' (default 'avg,min,med,max,p(90),p(95)')

options.description: Define the time unit used to display the trend stats. Possible units are: 's', 'ms' and 'us'

arg.name: summary-time-unit
arg.description: Define the time unit used to display the trend stats. Possible units are: 's', 'ms' and 'us'

options.description: Only include these system tags in metrics (default "proto,subproto,status,method,url,name,group,check,error,error_code,tls_version,scenario,service,expected_response")

arg.name: system-tags
arg.description: Only include these system tags in metrics (default "proto,subproto,status,method,url,name,group,check,error,error_code,tls_version,scenario,service,expected_response")

options.description: Add a tag to be applied to all samples, as `[name]=[value]`

arg.name: tag
arg.description: Add a tag to be applied to all samples, as `[name]=[value]`

options.description: Redirects the console logging to the provided output file

arg.name: console-output
arg.description: Redirects the console logging to the provided output file

options.description: Read but don't process or save HTTP response bodies

arg.name: discard-response-bodies
arg.description: Read but don't process or save HTTP response bodies

options.description: Client IP Ranges and/or CIDRs from which each VU will be making requests, e.g. '192.168.220.1,192.168.0.10-192.168.0.25', 'fd:1::0/120', etc

arg.name: local-ips
arg.description: Client IP Ranges and/or CIDRs from which each VU will be making requests, e.g. '192.168.220.1,192.168.0.10-192.168.0.25', 'fd:1::0/120', etc

arg.name: dns
arg.description: DNS resolver configuration

options.description: Pass the real system environment variables to the runtime (default true)

arg.name: include-system-env-vars
arg.description: Pass the real system environment variables to the runtime (default true)

arg.name: compatibility-mode
arg.description: JavaScript compiler compatibility mode, "extended" or "base"

arg.name: type
arg.description: Override test type, "js" or "archive"

arg.name: env
arg.description: Add/override environment variable with VAR=value

arg.name: no-thresholds
arg.description: Don't run thresholds

options.description: Don't show the summary at the end of the test

arg.name: no-summary
arg.description: Don't show the summary at the end of the test

options.description: Output the end-of-test summary report to JSON file

arg.name: summary-export
arg.description: Output the end-of-test summary report to JSON file

options.description: Uri for an external metrics database

arg.name: out
arg.description: Uri for an external metrics database

options.description: Keep the API server alive past test end

arg.name: linger
arg.description: Keep the API server alive past test end

options.description: Don't send anonymous stats to the developers

arg.name: no-usage-report
arg.description: Don't send anonymous stats to the developers

arg.name: max
arg.description: Max available virtual users

arg.name: vus
arg.description: Number of virtual users (default 1)

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Show the application version and exit

options.description: Address for the REST API server (default "localhost:6565")

arg.name: address
arg.description: Address for the REST API server (default "localhost:6565")

arg.name: config
arg.description: JSON config file

arg.name: log-format
arg.description: Log output format

options.description: Change the output for k6 logs

arg.name: log-output
arg.description: Change the output for k6 logs

arg.name: no-color
arg.description: Disable colored output
